scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev:api: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; PORT=${PORT:-8080} pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev
scripts.dev:mobile: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; HOME=$PWD/.local/expo-home XDG_CONFIG_HOME=$PWD/.local/expo-home/.config EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=${EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:8080} pnpm --filter @workspace/mobile exec expo start --localhost
scripts.dev:mockup: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; PORT=${MOCKUP_PORT:-8081} BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/} pnpm --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox run dev
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
